primary.listening: Press the hotkey again to stop and transcribe
primary.error: Something went wrong — check logs or retry
primary.result: Inserted into input · press the hotkey to dictate again

transcribe_failed.title: Transcription failed
transcribe_failed.no_transcript: Nothing was recognized — retry from History

paste_failed.title: Auto-paste failed
paste_failed.description: Text is on the clipboard — press Cmd/Ctrl+V manually

not_logged_in.title: Not signed in to OpenSpeech
not_logged_in.description: Sign in to use voice input

worker_dead.title: Voice channel disconnected
worker_dead.description: This recording has been stopped — please try again

insufficient_credits.title: Insufficient credits
insufficient_credits.description: This transcription was cancelled — top up in your account

realtime_degraded.title: Realtime ASR glitch
realtime_degraded.realtime_mode: First half kept; retry the full take from history

error.sync_hotkey_failed: Failed to sync hotkeys to Rust: {{error}}
error.byok_not_implemented: Custom BYOK channel under development; ships in the next release
error.byok_missing_credentials: Custom provider credentials missing — set them in Settings → Dictation → Custom providers
error.byok_keyring_error: Failed to read custom provider credentials from the system keychain
error.file_too_large_for_tencent_byok: Recording exceeds the Tencent BYOK file transcription limit (~5 minutes). Switch to REALTIME mode or shorten the recording.
error.tencent_task_timeout: Tencent task timed out (no result after 24 minutes)
error.tencent_unauthenticated: Tencent BYOK auth failed — check the SecretId / SecretKey in Settings
error.tencent_rate_limited: Tencent BYOK rate-limited — wait a moment and retry
error.unauthenticated_byok: Custom credentials rejected — check the SecretId / SecretKey
error.insufficient_funds: Tencent Cloud account is out of credits or service is not enabled
error.idle_timeout: Disconnected after a long silence with no audio
error.rate_limited: Provider rate-limited the request — wait a moment and retry
error.aliyun_invalid_audio_format: Audio format not supported by Aliyun DashScope — check the sample rate / bit depth
error.aliyun_unauthenticated: Aliyun DashScope auth failed — check the ApiKey in Settings
error.aliyun_rate_limited: Aliyun DashScope rate-limited — wait a moment and retry
error.aliyun_filetrans_timeout: Aliyun DashScope task timed out (no result after 24 minutes)
error.aliyun_file_too_large: Recording exceeds the Aliyun DashScope BYOK single-file limit (default 100 MB)
